Title: User Registration
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the homepage.
2. Click on the "Register" button.
3. Enter a valid email, password, and name in the respective fields.
4. Click on the "Register" button.
Expected Result: The user should be successfully registered and redirected to the homepage.

Title: Invalid User Registration
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the homepage.
2. Click on the "Register" button.
3. Enter an invalid email, password, or name in the respective fields.
4. Click on the "Register" button.
Expected Result: An error message should be displayed, and the user should not be registered.

Title: Service Interaction
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the homepage.
2. Click on the service link.
3. Interact with the service as a logged-in user.
Expected Result: The user should be able to interact with the service successfully.

Title: Create Object
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the creation module.
2. Enter valid object data in the respective fields.
3. Click on the "Create" button.
Expected Result: The object should be successfully created and displayed on the screen.

Title: Invalid Object Creation
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the creation module.
2. Enter invalid object data in the respective fields.
3. Click on the "Create" button.
Expected Result: An error message should be displayed, and the object should not be created.

Title: Menu Interaction
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the homepage.
2. Interact with the menu as a logged-in user.
Expected Result: The user should be able to interact with the menu successfully.

Title: Invalid Menu Interaction
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the homepage.
2. Select an invalid menu option.
Expected Result: An error message should be displayed, and the user should not be able to interact with the selected menu option.
